hero.name: Anuket Kumar
hero.description: I specialize in building scalable, high-performance cross-platform applications. With over 3 years of experience, I transform complex business requirements into elegant, user-centric mobile and web solutions using Flutter and Dart.

about.description1: I am a passionate software engineer focused on crafting robust mobile and web applications. My expertise lies in architecting complex Flutter projects, implementing clean state management, and seamlessly integrating backend services to deliver flawless user experiences.
about.description2: Beyond just writing code, I actively collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive product innovation and establish engineering best practices. When I'm not building apps, you can find me exploring new tech, traveling, or enjoying a long walk in the park.

description: Spearheaded the development of a dynamic customer dashboard, enhancing user engagement by 30%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement responsive design principles, ensuring seamless user experiences across various devices.
Introduced and implemented API integration and best practices in code reviews, resulting in a 20% improvement in code quality and faster development cycles.
Utilized advanced Dart concepts to create modular and reusable UI components, streamlining the development process and reducing time-to-market.
Actively participated in Agile ceremonies, fostering a collaborative and efficient development environment.
Analyzed user feedback to drive continuous improvement and user satisfaction.

jobs.company: Chakraborty and Lahkar Innovations Pvt. Ltd.
description: Played a critical role in implementing application designs and collaborating on cross-platform features to support product launches.

clientProjects.title: E-Commerce Solution
clientProjects.description: A responsive e-commerce web platform integrating backend services for real-time inventory and payments. Designed to provide a seamless shopping experience with a modern checkout flow for a retail client.

personalProjects.title: Lend Mate
personalProjects.description: A comprehensive loan management application built to help users manage debts and view schedules. Features complex local state management, dynamic PDF report generation, and extra payment tracking.

contact.heading: Ready to Start?
contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: I'm currently taking on new clients and exciting freelance projects. If you have a business problem that needs a technical solution, or if you simply want to discuss an idea, my inbox is always open. Let's make it happen!
contact.subject: Inquiry: Let's build an app together
